---
title: "summer_analysis"
author: Natalie Novoseltseva
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo       
    code-fold: true    
    toc: true         
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
```

Data


```{r}
combined <- read_csv("Spring2026/data/joined_dataset.csv")

combined <-combined %>% 
  mutate(
  season_astro = case_when(
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-12-21")) | date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) ~ "Winter",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) ~ "Spring",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-09-22")) ~ "Summer",
    TRUE ~ "Fall"
  )
)
```

Summer Data Sets

```{r}
#original dataset, but filtered to summer observations
combined_summer <- combined %>%
  filter(season_astro == "Summer")

names(combined_summer)


#summer dataset by day
summer_daily_avg <- combined_summer %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      where(is.numeric),
      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#summer dataset by week
summer_weekly_avg <- combined_summer %>%
  mutate(week = floor_date(date, unit = "week")) %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      where(is.numeric),
      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
names(summer_weekly_avg)
```

Summer dataset by day

Turbidity

```{r}

ggplot(summer_daily_avg, aes(x = date, y = Turb)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1D91C0", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(color = "#1D91C0", size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  
  # optional smooth trend per panel
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#E34A33", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ year, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Daily Average Turbidity by Year (Summer)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Turbidity (NTU)"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

Total Precipitation 

```{r}

ggplot(summer_daily_avg, aes(x = date, y = TotPrcp)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2CA25F", alpha = 0.8) +  # bars work better for precipitation
  
  facet_wrap(~ year, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Daily Total Precipitation by Year (Summer)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Precipitation"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

Specific Conductivity

```{r}
ggplot(summer_daily_avg, aes(x = date, y = SpCond)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2C7FB8", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Daily Mean Specific Conductivity by Year (Summer)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Specific Conductivity (µS/cm or appropriate units)"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```


Total Precipitation and Turbidity

```{r}
scale_factor <- max(summer_daily_avg$Turb, na.rm = TRUE) / 
                max(summer_daily_avg$TotPrcp, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(summer_daily_avg, aes(x = date)) +
  
  # Precipitation (bars)
  geom_col(
    aes(y = TotPrcp * scale_factor, fill = "Precipitation"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  
  # Turbidity (line)
  geom_line(
    aes(y = Turb, color = "Turbidity"),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ year, scales = "free_x") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Turbidity",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, name = "Precipitation")
  ) +
  
  # Custom legend colors
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Turbidity" = "#2C7FB8")
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Precipitation" = "#F03B20")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Turbidity and Precipitation Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

Year of 2006
```{r}

summer_2006 <- summer_daily_avg %>%
  filter(year == 2006)

scale_factor <- max(summer_2006$Turb, na.rm = TRUE) / 
                max(summer_2006$TotPrcp, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(summer_2006, aes(x = date)) +
  
  # Precipitation (bars)
  geom_col(
    aes(y = TotPrcp * scale_factor, fill = "Precipitation"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  
  # Turbidity (line)
  geom_line(
    aes(y = Turb, color = "Turbidity"),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Turbidity",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, name = "Precipitation")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Turbidity" = "#2C7FB8")
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Precipitation" = "#F03B20")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Turbidity and Precipitation Over Time (2006)",
    x = "Date",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(summer_2006, aes(x = TotPrcp, y = Turb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  theme_minimal()
```


Specific Conductivity and Total precipitation

```{r}
scale_factor <- max(summer_daily_avg$SpCond, na.rm = TRUE) / 
                max(summer_daily_avg$TotPrcp, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(summer_daily_avg, aes(x = date)) +
  
  # Precipitation (bars, scaled)
  geom_col(
    aes(y = TotPrcp * scale_factor, fill = "Precipitation"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  
  # Specific Conductivity (line)
  geom_line(
    aes(y = SpCond, color = "Specific Conductivity"),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ year, scales = "free_x") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Specific Conductivity",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, name = "Precipitation")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Specific Conductivity" = "#2C7FB8")
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Precipitation" = "#F03B20")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Specific Conductivity and Precipitation Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

Weekly Dataset

```{r}
ggplot(summer_weekly_avg, aes(x = week, y = TotPrcp)) +
  
  geom_col(fill = "#F03B20", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Total Precipitation (Summer)",
    x = "Week",
    y = "Precipitation"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(summer_weekly_avg, aes(x = week, y = SpCond)) +
  
  geom_col(fill = "#F03B20", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Specific Conductivity (Summer)",
    x = "Week",
    y = "Specific Conductivity"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(summer_weekly_avg, aes(x = week, y = SpCond)) +
  
  geom_line(color = "#2C7FB8", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#2C7FB8", size = 1.8) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Specific Conductivity (Summer)",
    x = "Week",
    y = "Specific Conductivity"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
